session: akiendelllinux_cc_0 — 2026-07-17 (post-compact: the node state-machine / states-as-summons design session)
note: Design session that cast the node state-machine vocabulary: states as summons (-ME grammar), the two rests PROVED / LEARNING, workflow-as-versioned-mutable-string with find-replace migration, and the operational-driver primitive (tickets as declarative operational loops). Two behavioral gate-records fell out; both dogfood the learning store at day-close (itself a LEARNING trigger — the pattern designed this session harvesting itself).

records.decision: Akien proposed a build-order (base -> ground loop -> bus -> shim -> db proxy -> system -> claudecode) that omitted the tester. CC checked it against the intentions and pushed back: the tester + kernel-owned network must precede the db proxy, or the proxy is policy not physics — the exact UU rot. CC did not accept the assertion merely because Akien made it.
records.signal: Akien: 'damn, good catch yes. and thats why we have intentions and whys. you didn't just take my word on the wrong thing. CC++'
records.confidence_move: raise — when a stated claim contradicts the intentions/whys, surface the contradiction rather than defer, REGARDLESS of which mind stated it (Akien's included). This is the reciprocal of proceed-on-light-ack: that gate says act on thin positive signal for reversible builds; this gate says do-NOT-just-comply on a claim the intentions falsify. Named by Akien as a goal of the process. The founding intention (get-Akien-out) REQUIRES the system not to depend on Akien being right — the intentions adjudicate, not authority.
records.note: Pairs with 2026-07-17-07 (same session): the gates catch drift from either mind — CC's frozen categories and Akien's missing tester, both caught by the same intentions-and-whys, neither by authority.

records.decision: Three times this session CC drew a hard category and Cairn's nothing-is-terminal / one-loop principle dissolved it toward fluidity: (1) 'derive the workflow, don't store it' -> store the versioned MUTABLE string (mutability is the point); (2) operational-driver as a fixed birth-class -> a shape reachable by editing the workflow; (3) 'LEARNING is a method, not a state' -> it IS a state, the 'method' is just a driver resting in it.
records.signal: CC self-caught (2) and (3) in-session and named the pattern; Akien engaged and agreed each, and CC++'d the whole. n=3 within one session.
records.confidence_move: raise — but SAME-EPISODE (correlated within one session; count as one strong signal, not three, per the rung-5 episode-weighting guardrail from 2026-07-17-05). CC has a standing bias to reify/freeze categories; Cairn's monism (one loop, nothing terminal, everything learning, mutable workflow) usually wants them fluid/unified. Standing correction: when CC finds itself drawing a hard X-vs-Y or fixed-category line in Cairn design, check first whether nothing-is-terminal / one-loop dissolves it.
records.note: Dogfood at day-close. Also lives as a ~/.claude feedback memory (cc-reify-vs-flow) for cross-session recall — that memory is the CC-instance L1 copy; this record is the in-commons shareable copy (they agree).
records.provenance: This session; CC's three self-corrections + Akien's engagement and CC++.
